title: Inventory Verification
objective: Verify stock, intake cases, routing defaults, and fulfillment state in the inventory domain.

steps.description: Inspect item counts, case queues, active distributions, and routing defaults.
Separate catalog issues, stale assignments, contact linkage failures, and schedule drift.
Confirm whether forms or contacts introduced the inconsistency.
Draft item updates, routing corrections, or assignment proposals.

escalation_rules: Escalate to permission_diagnostics if staff can view inventory but cannot resolve assignments.
Escalate to system_health_diagnostics when dashboard totals are stale or sync appears broken.
